meta.title: VigApp — Software & Digital Marketing Studio
meta.description: VigApp designs and engineers custom software, SaaS platforms, e-commerce and high-converting digital experiences — then grows them with performance marketing.

nav.whatsappMessage: Hi VigApp! I would like to discuss a project.

hero.title: Digital products
hero.subtitle: We design, build and scale custom software, platforms and campaigns for any industry. This entire site is our portfolio — every project below is a living, explorable product.

services.title: One partner, every capability
services.subtitle: From the first wireframe to the ad campaign that fills your pipeline — strategy, design, engineering and growth under one roof.

software.title: Custom Software
software.description: Enterprise systems, internal platforms, CRMs, ERPs and dashboards built around the way your business actually operates.

saas.title: SaaS & Product
saas.description: Full product design and engineering for subscription platforms — from MVP to scale, with AI and API integrations.

web.title: Websites & Landing Pages
web.description: Corporate websites, high-converting sales pages and marketing sites with obsessive attention to motion and detail.

commerce.title: E-commerce & Ordering
commerce.description: Online stores, restaurant ordering, food delivery and WhatsApp sales automation that turn browsers into buyers.

automation.title: AI & Automation
automation.description: AI integrations, chat automation and workflow orchestration that remove manual work from your operation.

growth.title: Digital Marketing
growth.description: Google Ads, Meta Ads, SEO, funnels and analytics — performance marketing wired directly into the product we build.

showcase.title: Choose an industry. Step inside.
showcase.subtitle: Each project is a fully explorable concept — its own brand, its own motion language, its own product logic.

stats.title: Design that converts, code that lasts

marketingTeaser.title: Built to launch. Wired to grow.
marketingTeaser.subtitle: A beautiful product without traffic is a secret. Traffic without a converting product is a leak. We engineer both sides of the funnel.

cta.title: Your industry is in here somewhere.
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you run — a restaurant, a clinic, a fund, a fleet — and we will show you what it could look like.

work.title: The showroom
work.subtitle: Six flagship concepts, six design languages — each with its own real-time 3D. Every card opens a living product you can click, scroll and explore.

burger-restaurant.tagline: A rock'n'roll burger joint with a digital menu that shreds

law-firm.tagline: Corporate counsel with a century of precedent

medical-clinic.tagline: Human healthcare with online booking that feels calm

dental-clinic.tagline: Smile design, implants and gentle appointments

gym.tagline: Strength programming with volt energy and member plans

beauty-salon.tagline: Hair, skin and ritual — booked in three taps

fashion-brand.tagline: A monochrome maison with gold-leaf editorials

sneaker-store.tagline: Streetwear catalog with 360° sneakers and live drops

luxury-jewelry.tagline: High jewelry on black velvet with configurator

electronics-store.tagline: Flagship tech retail with comparison engine

automotive-dealer.tagline: A premium dealership with a real-3D showroom and financing

hotel.tagline: A forest retreat with suites, spa and booking flow

school.tagline: A bright K-12 school parents fall in love with

university.tagline: Collegiate heritage with programs and admissions

tech-startup.tagline: A venture-backed startup with a glowing product story

enterprise-saas.tagline: Glassmorphic platform marketing with live product UI

crm-platform.tagline: Pipeline, contacts and deals in a focused workspace

erp-dashboard.tagline: Operations command center for inventory and finance

analytics-dashboard.tagline: Realtime metrics with charts that feel alive

finance-platform.tagline: A warm digital bank with a metal card and money boxes that grow

insurance.tagline: Coverage made legible with instant quote flow

marketing-agency.tagline: Brutalist agency site that shouts case studies

corporate-website.tagline: Global holding company with investor-grade polish

landing-page.tagline: A single product page engineered to convert

online-course.tagline: Cohort courses with curriculum and enrollment

subscription-platform.tagline: A snack box subscription with plan builder

scheduling-platform.tagline: Calendly-style booking with live slot picking

whatsapp-ordering.tagline: Chat-first ordering that ends in a WhatsApp cart

food-delivery.tagline: Multi-restaurant delivery with live order tracking

ai-platform.tagline: An AI fluent in Brazil — Portuguese first, LGPD-ready

business-dashboard.tagline: KPIs, teams and goals on one executive screen

hero.title: Traffic. Conversion. Revenue.
hero.subtitle: Software gets you a product. Marketing gets it customers. We run both as one system — the site you are browsing is the proof.

traffic.title: Traffic Generation
traffic.description: Paid and organic acquisition strategies engineered around your unit economics, not vanity metrics.

googleAds.title: Google Ads
googleAds.description: Search, Shopping, YouTube and Performance Max campaigns with granular conversion tracking.

metaAds.title: Meta Ads
metaAds.description: Full-funnel Instagram and Facebook campaigns with creative testing at scale.

seo.title: SEO
seo.description: Technical SEO, content architecture and Core Web Vitals — built into the code, not bolted on.

content.title: Content Strategy
content.description: Editorial systems that compound: pillar content, distribution and repurposing loops.

branding.title: Brand Positioning
branding.description: Naming, identity and messaging that make premium pricing feel obvious.

cro.title: Conversion Optimization
cro.description: Research-driven A/B testing on pages, flows and offers. Every pixel earns its place.

leads.title: Lead Generation
leads.description: Landing pages, lead magnets and qualification flows that fill your CRM with real buyers.

funnels.title: Conversion Funnels
funnels.description: Mapped journeys from first click to closed deal — with every leak measured and patched.

automation.title: Marketing Automation
automation.description: Email, WhatsApp and CRM automations that follow up while you sleep.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Dashboards that show one truth: what you spent, what returned, and where to double down.

synergy.title: Why software plus marketing beats both apart
synergy.body: When the team that builds your product also runs your acquisition, feedback moves at commit speed. Landing pages ship the same week the campaign concept is born. Tracking is native, not taped on. The funnel becomes a product feature.

speed.title: Ship at campaign speed
speed.description: New offers, pages and experiments deployed in days — no agency-to-dev handoff.

data.title: One data spine
data.description: Product analytics and ad platforms share one source of truth for revenue attribution.

iteration.title: Compounding iteration
iteration.description: Every campaign teaches the product; every product release feeds the campaigns.

cta.title: Ready to grow on purpose?
cta.subtitle: Send us your goals and current numbers. We will map the fastest route between them.

contact.title: Tell us what you are building
contact.subtitle: A message is enough to start. We reply within one business day — usually much faster.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Message received. We will get back to you shortly.
form.successNote: Prefer instant? Ping us on WhatsApp below.

errors.name: Please tell us your name.
errors.message: Give us at least a sentence about the project.

channels.title: Direct channels
channels.whatsappMessage: Hi VigApp! I want to talk about a project.

schedule.title: Pick a time that suits you
schedule.subtitle: A 30-minute discovery call — free, focused, and honest about whether we are the right fit.
schedule.confirmed: Slot requested! We will confirm by WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: A studio that designs, engineers and grows digital products for any industry — from the first sketch to the last conversion.
